steps.title: Compare the awareness claims
steps.content: Text 1 claims Bergamo's UNESCO honor is well known among residents and tourists. Text 2 argues that without effective marketing, many current and potential visitors may not even know Bergamo has a notable food scene.

steps.title: Reject unrelated responses
steps.content: Choice A defends whether Bergamo deserved the honor. Choice C discusses other benefits of the designation. Choice D credits chefs for the recognition. Text 2 would challenge the idea that the status is widely known beyond residents. The answer is B.
